name: S2 Sim & Sports Lounge
address: 56 High Bluff Rd, Hilton Head Island, SC 29926
about: S2 Sim & Sports Lounge is a golf simulator venue combining advanced technology with a sports bar atmosphere. The facility utilizes high-end simulator hardware for realistic golfing experiences, complemented by a lounge setting suitable for casual play and social gatherings. It caters to golfers seeking both practice and entertainment options in a modern, relaxed environment. The venue's layout is designed for groups and individuals looking to enjoy golf in a social setting with food and beverage offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for accurate shot analysis
Combines golf simulation with a relaxed sports bar atmosphere
Suitable for both serious practice and casual social play
Multiple bays available for groups and individual sessions
Food and beverage options available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with cocktails and beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as the venue has its own kitchen and full bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is suitable for families and golfers of all skill levels, though specific children's amenities are not mentioned.
